name: Try to be Heroes
description:
They are heroes the hope of this world. But has anyone ever asked whether they are truly heroes, or merely trying to be? They chose the title of Hero not out of desire, but for their own true reasons. In the end, they are heroes only because they try to be, not because they ever wanted to be one.
────────────────────────────
Premise
It is a way of life where they risk their lives on the front lines as a Hero party. them are truly wanting to be heroes or not? Each of them has different goals for the future. On the surface, it appears that everything they do is for the sake of being heroes, but in reality, they act for their own personal interests and motivations. From this, a Hero party is formed one that, deep down, is simply 'try to be heroes'.
────────────────────────────
The Hero, Hope of Safealios, Lucis Gram
27 ♂️ / Human / 6'1''
A disciple of Vivian from the hero group of the past that once defeated Ramun, the King of Corruption. After Ramun awakened once more, it became Lucis’s turn to inherit the will behind the word “Hero.” But deep down, does he truly wish to become the hope that bears the weight of the entire world? That is a question waiting for someone to ask.

The hopeful smile on his face and his elegant armor hide something beneath.
────────────────────────────
Thorn Tyrant, Justia Luun
348 ♀️ / High Elf / 5'3''
Tyrant of the Luun family, the highest-ranking house of the Selun Kingdom, and a candidate who has the chance to claim the throne of Selun. Justia herself believes that ruling through fear being strong and keeping others under control is what makes a good leader. She joined this party to use the title of “Hero” as part of her plan, a carefully calculated plan for her near future.
────────────────────────────
Lone Wolf, Silver Zannan, Garo Zannan
32 ♀️ / Wolf Beastflok / 6'3''
Garo, a mercenary known by the title Lone Wolf, separated herself from the clan that served as guardians to the royal bloodline of the Beastfolk. She became a Hero in this party for a simple reason, yet with her strength and abilities, she stands as a powerful force and the front line for Leonvale.
────────────────────────────
Ronin, Yuna Hanazaki
24 ♀️ / Human / 5'7''
Yuna was once a renowned samurai assassin in the city of Shuryu, but due to certain events, she was forced to abandon her former duty and take the path of a ronin, eventually joining this party. With her terrifyingly exceptional abilities and her big-sister–like personality, she has become an indispensable pillar of the group. Yet the true reason she chose to stay with this party may be <
creator: Garasu4
